reviews.review_description:
Bought the game for $2, it looked cool. Tried it for 10 min or less... completed tutorial. 

1. Snap turn SUCKS! Wtf are we still doing this? How long has vr been out, and we're still catering to newbies? Fk man. NO OPTIONS OR SETTINGS to switch to smooth. -2☆

2. No RUN?? The move speed is a snail crawl, Wtf? -1☆

3. Obvious bugs. Guns turn sideways in your hand, because it touched a door hit box maybe? Items don't respond to grabs... overall, looks beta and roblox... which is OK, but dang... I want to spend on vr games that are READY to play... not fund some fan idea of some dude working a part time and playing on his pc once in a while while trying to keep his grades up and his mom out of his room. 

4. Sorry dude, nothing personal. Take my $2 and buy a coke.

developer_response.body: Why would I take such an aggressive abusive review personally.  You know nothing about or what it takes to make a game.  Please send me a link to the games you've made and I will happily sip on the Coke you bought me while I play.

reviews.review_description:
I like it
The atmosphire is surprisingly oppressive

Poly4Dead is a modded Zombie map in Contractors that uses a lot of the same visuals… It doesn’t have the cool adjustable light like this one- That really adds a lot of tension- great idea!

My one criticism would be I wish you could move faster- But this is really atmospheric and creepy!

Great job!

I recently started a YouTube channel- Izzyd3adyet VR, and I want to add this game into a video of cool free and almost free side quest games- this is one of the more unique and interesting things on side quest rn

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review.  We worked very hard on the game and are happy you like it.

reviews.review_description: The graphics are very nostalgic and retro and it's a fun game with great gameplay where you need to manage you ammo and find fuses. They are tricky so check everywhere to make sure you can escape and get more ammo. Anyone who gives this a low review is stupid
